assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing

Lines 9-39 indicate all Project Configuration sections were newly added: '## Repository Registry' (line 16, 'Newly added'), '## Jira Configuration' (line 25, 'Newly added'), '## Code Intelligence' (line 34, 'Newly added').

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5 shows the table header: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' which exactly matches the required columns.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 8 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md does not contain '## Security Configuration' anywhere in the file (34 lines total, no mention of Security Configuration). Additionally, changes-log.md line 43 explicitly states '## Security Configuration -- user declined security triage setup' under 'Not added', and discovery-log.md line 28 confirms 'User declined security triage configuration -- section not created.'
